titleStmt.title: Lyrical Ballads 1800, volume 2, a machine-readable edition
titleStmt.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge and William Wordsworth

sourceDesc.p: Edited from the copy of Lyrical Ballads,1800, volume 2, at the University of Colorado-Boulder, 1997-99. Contains the Michael cancel and the new errata sheet.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI-conformant SGML by Bruce Graver and Ronald Tetreault, with significant help from CETH, the STG, and others; encoding upgraded to TEI P5 xml by Laura Mandell, 7/3/2025.

docTitle.titlePart:
LYRICAL BALLADS,
WITH
OTHER POEMS.
IN TWO VOLUMES.

epigraph.p: Quam nihil ad genium, Papiniane, tuum!

titlePage.docImprint:
VOL. II.
LONDON:
PRINTED FOR T. N. LONGMAN AND O. REES, PATERNOSTER-ROW,
BY BIGGS AND CO. BRISTOL.
1800.
